name: Apollo SBI Card SELECT
exclusions: transactions excluded under Apollo SBI Card SELECT terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh in the previous year
Noise smartwatch benefit on annual spends of Rs 6 lakh, subject to product terms
additionalBenefits: Apollo 24/7 e-gift voucher worth Rs 1,500 on eligible joining fee payment
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 on Apollo 24/7 and Apollo Pharmacy spends
Up to 15% Health Credits on medicine purchases, up to 20% on diagnostic tests, and up to 10% on doctor consultations under Apollo Circle benefits
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 on dining, travel, movies and entertainment spends
1 Reward Point per Rs 200 on other eligible spends
1 Reward Point can be redeemed as 1 Apollo Health Credit
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 1 per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for two years
1-year complimentary FITPASS PRO membership and annual health check-up package, subject to product terms
